name: Gepard
desc: A captain in the Silvermane Guards and an outstanding warrior of Belobog.\nHe is meticulous and vigilant to the core and is always true to himself.

1.name: Due Diligence
1.desc: When using Skill, increases the <u>base chance</u> to Freeze the attacked target enemy by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

2.name: Lingering Cold
2.desc: After an enemy Frozen by Skill is unfrozen, their SPD is reduced by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Never Surrender
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Faith Moves Mountains
4.desc: When Gepard is in battle, all allies' Effect RES increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Cold Iron Fist
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Unyielding Resolve
6.desc: When his Talent is triggered, Gepard immediately takes action and restores extra HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP.

110401.name: Fist of Conviction
110401.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gepard's ATK to one designated enemy.
110401.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

110402.name: Daunting Smite
110402.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gepard's ATK to one designated enemy, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Freeze the enemy for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Frozen, the enemy cannot take action and will take Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gepard's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
110402.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to one enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>with a chance of Freezing them</color>.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

110403.name: Enduring Bulwark
110403.desc: Applies a Shield to all allies, absorbing DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gepard's DEF plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

110404.name: Unyielding Will
110404.desc: When struck with a killing blow, instead of becoming <u>knocked down</u>, Gepard's HP immediately restores to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP. This effect can only trigger once per battle.
110404.simple_desc: When struck by a killing blow, <color=#f29e38ff>instead of being <u>knocked down</u></color>, immediately restores HP. This effect can only trigger 1 time per battle.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

110406.name: Attack
110406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110407.name: Comradery
110407.desc: After Gepard uses his Technique, when the next battle begins, a Shield will be applied to all allies, absorbing DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Gepard's DEF plus <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110407.simple_desc: After this character uses Technique, all allies gain a Shield at the start of the next battle.

1.point_desc: Gepard has a higher chance to be attacked by enemies.
When "Unyielding Will" is triggered, Gepard's Energy will be restored to <unbreak>100%</unbreak>.
Gepard's ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his current DEF. This effect will refresh at the start of each turn.
